reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(7)(ii)(B) requires a disaster recovery plan, which in a Kubernetes context involves ensuring that critical components like etcd and the API server are backed up. Additionally, the ability to restore these backups and test the recovery process is crucial. Documenting the disaster recovery plan is also a key part of compliance.
title: 164_308_a_7_ii_b: 164.308(a)(7)(ii)(B) Disaster recovery plan
